target.name: Together AI
target.founder: Vipul Ved Prakash, Ce Zhang, Chris Ré, Percy Liang

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $3.3B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $3.2B - $8.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: Reflection AI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series A), post-money $8B

data.narrative:
Together AI is a Series A-stage AI & Software company founded by Vipul Ved Prakash, Ce Zhang, Chris Ré, and Percy Liang, currently valued at $3.3B post-money on $530M raised. The peer universe comprises 9 private frontier-tech companies and 1 public comparable (Palantir), with top private peers including Reflection AI, Waymo, Figure AI, and Scale AI.

Two valuation methods triangulate forward value. Stage-progression analysis applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A-to-next-stage transitions, yielding $6.6B. Peer-median methodology anchors to three same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables—Reflection AI at $8.0B (Series A), Physical Intelligence at $5.6B (Series B), and Black Forest Labs at $3.2B (Series B)—producing a median of $5.6B. The peer range spans $3.2B to $8.0B.

These methods support a triangulated valuation range of $4.8B (low) to $7.6B (high), with a median of $6.1B. This implies 45-130% upside from current post-money valuation. Key uncertainties include the appropriate stage-progression multiplier in volatile frontier-tech markets, peer-selection sensitivity given nascent comparables, and momentum in AI infrastructure funding. The company's founder pedigree and capital raise size support positioning within the upper half of this range, though public-market comps remain limited.
